summary: Record the bounded aggregate verification after the MCP workbench handler and unopened-project read correction: 170 files and 1264 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Run one aggregate suite after the handler crossed the runtime, engine, artifact, and parameter seams; do not repeat while green.
decisions.rationale: The focused handler tests and production build were already green, and one aggregate run is sufficient to falsify cross-boundary regressions without entering a test loop.

testEvidence.criterion: Existing application behavior remains green after the MCP handler addition.
testEvidence.test: Run the complete Vitest suite once after the final handler correction.

red.outcome: No red run was required; the focused handler and build gates were green before this bounded aggregate.

green.outcome: GREEN: 170 test files passed and 1264 tests passed in 19.84s.

questions: Desktop MCP process/toggle lifecycle, permission UI, screenshot capture, approval-to-apply path, and hosted AC-11.b/c evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
